title: Entry Level Marketing Associate (Fresh Grad Friendly)
description:
🌟 Ready to Build a Career You’re Excited About?

We’re looking for go-getters, big dreamers, and action-takers.

If you’re motivated, eager to learn, and thrive in a fun, fast-moving environment — we want to meet you.

This isn’t your typical 9–5. It’s an opportunity to grow from day one, gain real-world experience, and be part of a team that wants to see you win. 


🚀 The Opportunity

We partner with brands to bring their campaigns to life through creative and strategic execution. You’ll take on meaningful work, learn practical skills, build confidence, and grow faster than you thought possible — all with strong mentorship and support.

No prior experience needed — just a positive mindset and learning attitude. We’ll guide you from Day 1.


💼 What You’ll Be Doing

  • Collaborate with the team to execute and support marketing campaigns
  • Create meaningful, memorable customer experiences
  • Brainstorming ideas and creative problem solving
  • Developing valuable communication, confidence, leadership skills

💎 What’s in It for You

  • 🌍 Travel Exposure – Regional and international opportunities
  • 👥 1-on-1 Mentorship – Personal coaching to level up your skills
  • 📈 Clear Career Growth – Direct progression and targets to level up
  • 💬 Supportive Culture – A team that grows with you
  • 🕒 Flexible Hours – More freedom and flow
  • 🤑 Performance-Based Incentives – Effort = Earnings


Job Details

Position: Full-Time

Schedule: Monday to Friday

Start Date: Immediate / Within 1–2 Weeks


🌱 No Experience? No Problem.

We hire based on attitude, not background. If you’re hungry to learn, open to growth, and be part of a high-energy team, we want to meet you.

👉 Apply now; and let’s see how far you can go.

postedCompany.description: At Royal Org, we believe the people make a difference. Like clay in a potter’s hand, we continuously mould each individual by giving them room to make mistakes, opportunities to be exposed to, and grow as a family. We strongly believe in guiding, leading and walking together as a team to achieve success.
postedCompany.name: ROYAL ORG PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
